ShortDescription.Value: Vendorable packet-first workflow core for token-efficient Codex orchestration.

Configuration.LongDescription: PacketFlow Foundry ships reusable packet-workflow contracts, templates, builders, and retained skills. This repo-local release adapter exists so the draft-release-copy workflow can bind PacketFlow Foundry release metadata without changing reusable core skill semantics.
Configuration.ChangeLog: - Restore wrapper-only repo-root .agents/skills and keep authoritative retained kernels under builders/packet-workflow/retained-skills. - Add consumer bootstrap and packet-workflow versioning metadata. - Capture repo-local release gating around packet-efficiency and token-savings drift.
